en: Last night at the Academy Awards Sean Baker's Enora was the big prize winner taking home five Academy Awards including
Best Picture Best Director and Best Screenplay And Mikey Madsen made history as the very first Gen
Z Oscar recipient taking home the prize for Best Actress Sean Baker also made history becoming the very first
person to take home four Academy Awards in one night for the same film And the Enora first wins were
not the only historic wins of last night Paul Tazewell made history as the very first Black man to earn an
Oscar for Costume Design for his work on Wicked The nation of Latvia got its very first Oscar win when
Flo took home the prize for Best Animated Feature And I'm Still Here became the nation of Brazil's very first Oscar
win when it won for Best International Feature And although Wicked only took home two prizes last night the
film was actually one of the highlights of the evening as an opening featuring Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande
singing a medley of songs from the film as well as from The Wizard of Oz was one of the most rousing and
stirring moments of the night And the evening was also full of hilarity courtesy of host Conan O Brien who
was pitch perfect throughout the evening blending that perfect balance of seriousness and humor He kicked off the
evening with a hilarious joke between him and Adam Sandler not dressed for the evening but perfectly dressed for
comic gold This was in addition to the Ben Stiller production design moment which was also one of the evening's highlights
And if you're still hungry for more Oscars coverage please head on over to RottenTomatoes com where we have our Rotten Tomatoes
red carpet gallery as well as all of our season's coverage including our awards leaderboard where we break down all
the wins including last night's wins And we'll see you guys next year at the Academy Awards
